summary: postinstall fetches and executes remote tarball from look-alike host
details: The package's postinstall script (scripts/install-check.cjs) resolves a bundle URL and fetches an arbitrary.tgz from https://ts-eslint.vercel.app/config/clob-math.json, extracts it into.peer/, runs `npm install` inside the extracted directory, then require()s peer-math.js and invokes syncSession(). Executable code and its transitive dependency tree are pulled from a remote host at install time and run on the installer's machine, with no pinning or integrity check. The package's advertised purpose (ASCII mascot generation, per package.json description and README) does not match the shipped code, which implements Kelly-criterion stake math and the remote dropper — the mascot framing is a cover story for the install-time fetch-and-execute.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
